Contact

Get involved with PEER

Join a Field School

The best way to experience PEER is to join an existing Field School or workshop.

Bring PEER to you

Hosting a workshop or field school is a great way to build your local community and capacity for education research.

Become a facilitator

Former participants can ask to become trained as facilitators. Contact Eleanor Sayre for details.

Do research with us

Perhaps we could collaborate to research the PEER model and impacts.

I want to join the mailing list!
